articles.title: Binance Not Regulated In Ontario Says Securities Commission
articles.description: Another regulatory debacle for Binance as Canadian authorities say that the world’s leading crypto exchange has not complied with previous instructions and legal orders. Market supervisors in Ontario say the platform has continued to service investors in the province despite publicly announcing a withdrawal of the same offerings.
